leadText: Work Up (Japanese: ふるいたてる Cheer Up) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM83 in Generation V. TM01 in Pokémon Sun and Moon and Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TR85 in Pokémon Sword and Shield TM10 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM103 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Work Up raises the user's Attack and Special Attack stats by one stage each. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Work Up, the user's Attack stat is raised by an additional one stage. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Status Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power — Cooldown 15s Move wind-up time 40 frames Effect duration 12s 15s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase. S V The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted. ZA The user boosts its Attack and Sp. Atk stats for a short time by getting worked up.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It boosts your Attack and Special Attack. (The stat changes return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.) S MD It boosts your Attack and Sp. Atk. The stats return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.
